title: Improving the Traveler Experience Across Key Moments
subtitle: Supporting bookings, check-ins, and ancillary revenue through more timely and personalized engagement.
overview: A fast-growing airline partnered with Attributics to improve digital engagement across bookings, check-ins, and upsells through timely and personalized customer communication.

challenge.description: The airline needed to improve booking funnel performance, capture more upsell opportunities, and engage travelers more effectively across multiple customer touchpoints.

solution.description: An omnichannel personalization framework was created with automated reminders for bookings and check-ins, retargeting for abandoned searches, and contextual cross-sell campaigns.

process.description: Key travel journey moments were identified, automated engagement flows were set up around booking and check-in behavior, and cross-sell opportunities were activated based on traveler context.

results: Flight booking conversions increased by 35%, check-in rates improved by 25%, upsell and cross-sell purchases grew by 40%, and overall engagement improved by 20%.
techStack: Omnichannel personalization, automated reminders, retargeting, contextual cross-sell campaigns.
conclusion: The solution helped the airline create a more responsive and personalized traveler engagement model, improving both core conversion outcomes and ancillary revenue performance.
